text:
In the first scene, peering through the glass at a meeting or workshop, I feel a sense of being an observer—separated yet curious, quietly attentive to the human rituals of collaboration. The air is filled with the muted hum of productive minds, but I remain on the threshold, reflective and alone.

In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant R+D visuals and explanations, I feel invigorated and inspired, as though I am on the cusp of discovery. The interplay of color, design, and thoughtful display draws me into a world where imagination and knowledge converge. This is a place where questions matter, and every detail sparks a new contemplation.
